title: Siouxium
description: A fabric modpack heavily focused on performance while still making the game heckin' fabulous!
body:
Siouxium is a modpack heavily focusing on performance and some utility
(This modpack was inspired by Simply Optimized!)

Here is a table of comparing other modpacks that are familiar to Siouxium
Tested on a;

> CPU: 12x AMD Ryzen 5 5500
> 
> GPU: AMD Radeon RX 6600
> 
> RAM: 16GB, only had 2 GB of ram allocated
> 
> Same world, same settings


| Modpack Name     | Average FPS     | CPU Usage      |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Siouxium v4         | 1500+              | 10%-30%           |
| Simply Optimized      | 850-1450             | 25%-32%             |
| Additive          | 880-1400             | 24%-29%            |
|   |   |   |

I hoped this helped! This can be used on any server.


<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- Capping your FPS to unlimited can cause lag spikes sometimes on specific servers

</details>
